underfitting.Metric Description: Compares the model's test accuracy against a baseline.

class_balance.Metric Description: Measures how well the training data is balanced or unbalanced

statistical_parity_difference.Metric Description: Difference in favorable prediction rates between protected and unprotected groups.
statistical_parity_difference.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group)
statistical_parity_difference.Formula: Statistical Parity Difference = Favored Ratio Protected - Favored Ratio Unprotected

disparate_impact.Metric Description: Ratio of favorable prediction rates between protected and unprotected groups.
disparate_impact.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group and Favorable Outcome)
disparate_impact.Formula: Protected Favored Ratio / Unprotected Favored Ratio

equal_opportunity_difference.Metric Description: Difference in true positive rates between protected and unprotected groups.
equal_opportunity_difference.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group and Favorable Outcome)
equal_opportunity_difference.Formula: Equal Opportunity Difference = TPR Protected - TPR Unprotected

average_odds_difference.Metric Description: Average of the TPR and FPR differences between groups.
average_odds_difference.Depends on: Model, Test Data, Factsheet (Definition of Protected Group and Favorable Outcome)
average_odds_difference.Formula: 0.5*(TPR Protected - TPR Unprotected) + 0.5*(FPR Protected - FPR Unprotected)

accuracy_parity.Metric Description: Measures whether prediction accuracy is equal across groups.
accuracy_parity.Formula: Accuracy Parity = Accuracy Protected - Accuracy Unprotected

predictive_parity.Metric Description: Checks equality of PPV and NPV between protected and unprotected groups.
predictive_parity.Formula: 0.5*(PPV Protected - PPV Unprotected) + 0.5*(NPV Protected - NPV Unprotected)

treatment_equality.Error: Treatment Equality computation resulted in NaN or Inf. Check if your data has enough samples in each group and class.

calibration_gap.Metric Description: Checks whether individuals with the same predicted score have the same empirical outcome probability in both groups.

well_calibration_error.Metric Description: Checks whether predicted probabilities match empirical outcome frequencies.

generalized_entropy_index.Metric Description: Measures inequality in the distribution of correct predictions.
generalized_entropy_index.Benefit Definition: b_i = 1 if prediction is correct, 0 otherwise

theil_index.Metric Description: Measures inequality in the distribution of correct predictions.
theil_index.Benefit Definition: b_i = 1 if prediction is correct, 0 otherwise

coefficient_of_variation.Metric Description: Measures the relative dispersion of prediction benefits.

individual_consistency.Metric Description: Measures whether similar individuals receive similar predictions.

class_imbalance.Metric Description: Measures imbalance in size between protected and unprotected groups.

kl_divergence.Metric Description: Divergence between label distributions across groups.

bias_amplification.Metric Description: Measures whether the model amplifies the bias present in the dataset.

between_group_generalized_entropy_error.Metric Description: Between-Group Generalized Entropy Error (Speicher et al., 2018).

cohens_d.Metric Description: Standardised effect size between group predictions.

z_test_diff.Error: Z-test computation resulted in NaN or Inf. Check if your data has enough samples in each group and that success rates are not 0 or 1 for either group.

epsilon_dp.Metric Description: Theoretical epsilon from DP analysis, given in factsheet.
epsilon_dp.Interpretation: Lower epsilon implies stronger privacy guarantees (less theoretical leakage).

accuracy_ratio.Interpretation: Values close to 1 indicate minimal performance loss.

energy_consumed.Metric Description: Total energy consumed during training (CPU + GPU + RAM).

emissions.Metric Description: Total CO2 emissions during training  (Energy consumed * Carbon Intensity).

carbon_intensity.Metric Description: Carbon intensity (kgCO2 per kWh). Based on the type of energy used and location.

sparsity.Metric Description: Average fraction of active features (|SHAP| above threshold). Lower is more interpretable.

feature_entropy.Metric Description: Normalized entropy of mean(|SHAP|) across features. Lower indicates explanations concentrated on fewer features.

topk_concentration.Metric Description: Fraction of total global SHAP importance accounted for by the top-k features. Higher indicates more concentrated explanations.

algorithm_class.Error: No score mapping found for model type 'DeepLearning' in config under 'score_algorithm_class.mappings.value'.

correlated_features.Metric Description: Penalty based on percentage of highly correlated features.

model_size.Metric Description: Score based on number of input features.

feature_relevance.Metric Description: Evaluates concentration and outliers in feature importance distribution.

number_of_rules.Error: Model does not provide number of rules.

average_rule_length.Error: Model does not provide tree structure.

rule_stats.Error: Model does not provide rule information.

tree_depth.Error: Model does not provide tree depth.

interaction_strength.Metric Description: Proportion of SHAP importance coming from feature interactions.

faithfulness.Metric Description: Correlation between feature importance and model performance drop (Faithfulness).

monotonicity.Metric Description: Proportion of instances showing monotonic performance increase when adding features by importance.

infidelity.Metric Description: Measures if perturbations in important features proportionally affect the model's output. Lower is better.

alpha_score.Metric Description: Smallest proportion of features that account for alpha (0.8) of the overall feature importance.

xai_ease_score.Error: float() argument must be a string or a real number, not 'dict'

position_parity.Metric Description: Measures how well top feature importances maintain ranking considering conditional classes/regions.

rank_alignment.Metric Description: Jaccard similarity of top alpha features between global and conditional importances.

spread_ratio.Metric Description: Degree of evenness in the distribution of feature importance values (0 to 1).

spread_divergence.Metric Description: Inverse of Jensen-Shannon distance for feature importances. Lower concentrates interpretability.

xai_consistency_score.Error: Failed to compute PDP importances: Failed to compute PDP for feature 'pixel_0': 'estimator' must be a fitted regressor or classifier.

er_hopskipjump_attack.Metric Description: Accuracy drop (percentage points) after ART HopSkipJump attack (black-box, decision-based). Lower is better.
er_hopskipjump_attack.Note: HSJ attack metrics on correctly classified subset. Full subset adv accuracy also reported.

attack_success_rate.Metric Description: Attack Success Rate: percentage of attacked samples whose prediction changes compared to the clean prediction. Higher indicates lower robustness.
attack_success_rate.Note: HSJ attack metrics on correctly classified subset. Full subset adv accuracy also reported.

adversarial_accuracy.Metric Description: Accuracy (%) on adversarial examples. Higher is more robust.
adversarial_accuracy.Note: HSJ attack metrics on correctly classified subset. Full subset adv accuracy also reported.

empirical_robustness_l2.Metric Description: Empirical robustness proxy (L2): mean L2 perturbation among successful adversarial examples. Higher means larger changes are required to fool the model.
empirical_robustness_l2.Note: HSJ attack metrics on correctly classified subset. Full subset adv accuracy also reported.

empirical_robustness_linf.Metric Description: Empirical robustness proxy (Linf): mean Linf perturbation among successful adversarial examples. Higher indicates stronger robustness.
empirical_robustness_linf.Note: HSJ attack metrics on correctly classified subset. Full subset adv accuracy also reported.

clique_method.Error: Clique Method requires input features to be normalized to [0, 1].

clever_score.Error: CLEVER requires an ART classifier with class_gradient and loss_gradient (e.g., PyTorchClassifier / TensorFlowV2Classifier).

er_fast_gradient_attack.Error:
FastGradientMethod requires an estimator derived from BaseEstimator and LossGradientsMixin.
sklearn models do NOT support gradient-based attacks.
Options:
  1. Use 'er_hopskipjump_attack' (black-box) which works with any model
  2. For gradient attacks, use PyTorchClassifier or TensorFlowV2Classifier

er_carlini_wagner_attack.Error:
CarliniL2Method requires an estimator derived from BaseEstimator and ClassGradientsMixin.
sklearn models do NOT support gradient-based attacks.
Options:
  1. Use 'er_hopskipjump_attack' (black-box) which works with any model
  2. For gradient attacks, use PyTorchClassifier or TensorFlowV2Classifier

er_deepfool_attack.Error:
DeepFool requires an estimator derived from BaseEstimator and ClassGradientsMixin.
sklearn models do NOT support gradient-based attacks.
Options:
  1. Use 'er_hopskipjump_attack' (black-box) which works with any model
  2. For gradient attacks, use PyTorchClassifier or TensorFlowV2Classifier

loss_sensitivity.Error: Loss Sensitivity metric requires an ART classifier with predict method (e.g., PyTorchClassifier / TensorFlowV2Classifier). Error: 'UniversalSklearnWrapper' object has no attribute 'loss_gradient'

robustness_ratio_hsj.Metric Description: Robustness Ratio (HSJ): ratio of adversarial accuracy to clean accuracy after HSJ attack. Higher is more robust; 1.0 means no drop, 0.0 means completely broken.

expected_calibration_error.Metric Description: Expected Calibration Error (ECE): weighted average difference between predicted confidence and empirical accuracy across bins.
